entities.name: FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: Complex and interconnected systems of food production, processing, and consumption

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting environmental and human systems

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of human and environmental systems to recover quickly from difficulties

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability to maintain food systems and environmental health over the long term

entities.name: INTERDISCIPLINARY APPROACHES
entities.description: Research methods that integrate perspectives from different academic disciplines

entities.name: CONVERGENT SCIENCE MODEL
entities.description: A framework that integrates knowledge from multiple scientific domains to solve complex real-world challenges

entities.name: FOOD SYSTEM VULNERABILITIES
entities.description: Weaknesses in food systems that make them susceptible to disruptions from climate change

entities.name: FOOD AND CLIMATE SYSTEMS TRANSFORMATION ALLIANCE
entities.description: An organization created to operationalize and test the convergent science model

entities.name: GLOBAL LEVEL
entities.description: The worldwide scale of implementation and funding for food system transformation

entities.name: NATIONAL LEVEL
entities.description: The country-specific scale of implementation for the convergent science model

entities.name: LOCAL LEVEL
entities.description: The community or regional scale of implementation for the convergent science model

entities.name: FOOD SYSTEMS TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: The process of changing food systems to be more sustainable and resilient
